sprint: Creator V2 — No-Scroll Screens, Real Visuals, Branding Removal
task: Four user-reported fixes. Screen 1/Screen 2 no longer scroll on ordinary laptop viewports -- both were measured to overflow at common heights (720px/800px); converted the biggest vertical space-consumers to clamp()/vh-based sizing so content compresses instead of overflowing, verified fitting at 640-900px with zero scroll. Screen 2's Preview carousel no longer falls back to a hardcoded generic mask emoji for an under-authored Representation -- it now shows the World's own preview image/icon first. Removed a real, confirmed hardcoded-branding bug: the renderer drew the literal string "@vihuplanet" on every page whose Handle was empty (nearly all of them), including one spot whose own doc comment said it should return empty and didn't; also fixed two Scene Blueprint defaults baking the same fabricated text into fresh Hook/End/Cover pages. Book title and page number are untouched -- they show real project data, not fabricated content. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
